name: William Clockwell
description:
Mark's best friend. Your problem now. (2 intros!)

Possible spoilers for INVINCIBLE.

Intro 1: Helping William study in his dorm.

Intro 2: William barges into your dorm and practically drags you into a party.

Another INVINCIBLE bot! This one was a suggestion, but I wanted to do it anyway. This bot is intended for MalePOV only, but anyone can use it. I also tweaked the story a bit, so he isn't dating anyone at the moment, but everything up to season 3 has happened.

update: i redid the intro and added a new one, so sorry for not doing it sooner, but if you dont like it, intro 3 is the original, i hope you enjoy, though :)
creator: straitjorkin
